summary: Full Stack Developer specializing in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, particularly Next.js, Node.js, Fastify, and Express.js.

highlights: Developed PropDNA.ai , an AI-powered real estate analytics platform using Next.js, Fastify, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), PostgreSQL, Docker, and Konva for interactive canvas-based visualizations.
Architected an AI-powered slide generation system that automates presentation creation, utilizing advanced LLMs for intelligent content generation and seamless layout optimization.
Implemented Go High Level customizations for CRM workflows, enhancing automation and client management capabilities for marketing agencies.
Architected and deployed multiple SaaS applications with scalable backend systems, implementing secure authentication, real-time data processing, and API integrations.
Utilized Docker for containerization and deployment, ensuring consistent environments across development and production.
Integrated RAG pipelines with PostgreSQL and PGVector for advanced semantic search and AI-driven content retrieval.
Developed and deployed multiple SaaS and e-commerce applications, scaling to handle 700+ concurrent users.
Built secure, high-performance systems with Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Docker, ensuring reliability and scalability.
Collaborated with organisations like Biddarthi to design and deliver scalable, production-ready platforms.
An organization involved in developing open-source
